title: Complaint discontinued on the basis of bad faith as complainant had released the retailer from liability
summary: The complainant and a retailer had been involved in litigation in small claims court, during which the complainant made an access request for her personal information. The parties settled the dispute by way of a settlement agreement, whereby the complainant received financial compensation in exchange for releasing the retailer from liabil...
dedupKey: complaint discontinued on the basis of bad faith as complainant had released the retailer from liability|2014-10-21
